title: What was wrong with the man's story?

meanings.usage: 指非法故意杀害他人的行为
常与crime, murder, suicide等词搭配使用
指负责调查或检查的警官
指证明某事属实或正确
arrive at + 小地点（车站）；arrive in + 大地点（城市）
un-是否定前缀，usual表示通常的
suggest that... 表示暗示某事，或建议做某事
指机械设备不能正常运转
catch a train/bus表示赶上火车/公交车
指通过视觉或听觉察觉某事

phrases.usage: 表示在某事发生的时候

examples.en: At the time the murder was committed, I was travelling.
examples.zh: 谋杀发生时，我正在旅行。

phrases.usage: 表示正在乘坐（某种交通工具）

examples.en: I was travelling on the 8 o'clock train.
I must catch the early train to work.
examples.zh: 我必须赶上早班火车去上班。

examples.en: I must be at work at 10 o'clock.
I bought a paper and waited for the train.

phrases.usage: 表示注意到任何不寻常的事

examples.en: Did you notice anything unusual at the station?
examples.zh: 你在车站注意到什么不寻常的事了吗？

examples.en: You are not telling the truth.

phrases.usage: 表示停止运营；取消（线路）

examples.en: The train was taken off the line.
I suggest that you are not telling the truth.
Would a later train get you to work on time?
examples.zh: 晚一点的火车能让你准时到公司吗？

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻或某一段时间正在进行的动作
grammar.structure: 主语 + was/were + 动词-ing + 时间状语
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去正在发生的行为，常与at the time, when等连用

examples.en: At the time the murder was committed, I was travelling on the 8 o'clock train.
examples.zh: 谋杀发生时，我正乘坐8点的火车。

examples.en: What were you doing at 8 o'clock yesterday?

grammar.title: 一般过去时 vs 过去进行时
grammar.definition: 一般过去时表示过去完成的动作；过去进行时表示过去正在进行的动作
grammar.structure:
一般过去时：主语 + 动词过去式
过去进行时：主语 + was/were + 动词-ing
grammar.usage: 当一个过去进行的动作被另一个过去的动作（一般过去时）打断时，常用过去进行时描述较长的背景动作

examples.en: I was waiting for the train when it arrived.
examples.zh: 火车来的时候我正在等它。

examples.en: While I was travelling, the murder happened.
examples.zh: 当我旅行时，谋杀发生了。

grammar.title: 宾语从句 (Object Clause) - I suggest that...
grammar.definition: that引导的宾语从句，用于表达观点、建议或暗示
grammar.structure: 主语 + suggest/believe/think + that + 主语 + 动词...
grammar.usage: suggest后面接that从句，表示暗示或建议某事为真

examples.en: I suggest that you are not telling the truth.
I suggest that he caught the 8.25 train.
examples.zh: 我暗示他赶上了8:25的火车。

sentencePatterns.pattern: At the time..., 主语 + was/were + doing...

original.en: At the time the murder was committed, I was travelling on the 8 o'clock train.
original.zh: 谋杀发生时，我正乘坐8点的火车。

imitations.en: At the time the accident happened, I was sleeping.
imitations.zh: 事故发生时，我正在睡觉。

imitations.en: At the time I called you, he was having dinner.
imitations.zh: 我给你打电话时，他正在吃晚饭。

sentencePatterns.pattern: Do you always + 动词原形...?

original.en: Do you always catch such an early train?
original.zh: 你总是赶这么早的火车吗？

imitations.en: Do you always get up so early?
Do you always have breakfast at home?

sentencePatterns.pattern: Would + 主语 + 动词原形 + get you to + 地点...?

original.en: Would a later train get you to work on time?
original.zh: 晚一点的火车能让你准时到公司吗？

imitations.en: Would a taxi get you to the airport on time?
imitations.zh: 出租车能让你准时到机场吗？

imitations.en: Would walking get you home before dark?
imitations.zh: 走路能让你在天黑前到家吗？

sentencePatterns.pattern: I suggest that + 主语 + 动词...

original.en: I suggest that you are not telling the truth.

imitations.en: I suggest that he was at the scene of the crime.
I suggest that she knows more than she says.
imitations.zh: 我暗示她知道的比她说的多。
